rationale: Gov't Code §2001.028 governs notice procedures for law enforcement rules adopted by the Commission on Jail Standards or TCOLE. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Notice of the adoption of a proposed rule by the Commission on Jail Standards or the Texas Commission on Law Enforcement that affects a law enforcement agency of the state or of a political subdivision of the state is not effective until the notice is:
_note: No conflict: the cited rule concerns administrative notice procedures for law enforcement rules and has no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
